sentences.english: I've tried every diet you can imagine.
sentences.korean: 상상할 수 있는 모든 다이어트를 해봤어요.

sentences.english: Keto, intermittent fasting, vegan — none of them worked long-term.
sentences.korean: 키토 간헐적 단식 비건 — 어느 것도 장기적으로 안 됐어요.

sentences.english: I don't believe in diets, just eating in moderation.
Eat everything but in smaller portions.
sentences.korean: 그냥 적당히 먹으면 돼요. 다 먹되 양을 줄이면 돼요.

sentences.english: I gave up sugar for three months and lost five kilograms, but then I went back to my old habits.
sentences.korean: 설탕을 3개월 끊고 5킬로를 뺐지만 다시 옛 습관으로 돌아갔어요.
